scope: real minimal-label curves (R2 labeled slice); not SOTA

0.claim_boundary: k=0 gain sign non-identifiable under R1

1.claim_boundary: k>0 estimates a labeled-slice gain under an iid sampling contract and compares it to the oracle full-target sign; NOT full-target identification without that contract.

2.claim_boundary: k>0 estimates a labeled-slice gain under an iid sampling contract and compares it to the oracle full-target sign; NOT full-target identification without that contract.

256.claim_boundary: k>0 estimates a labeled-slice gain under an iid sampling contract and compares it to the oracle full-target sign; NOT full-target identification without that contract.

claim_boundary: k=0 = R1 non-identifiable; k>0 = R2 labeled slice under an iid sampling contract compared to the oracle full-target sign; not full-target identification. Oracle labels are used only here (R2/evaluation).
